top_level_schema.registry_id: string — unique identifier for this registry version
top_level_schema.rule_types: object — documentation of supported rule type semantics
top_level_schema.activation_classes: object — documentation of activation class semantics

detection_rule_schema.type: string — one of: path_prefix | path_contains | filename_equals | extension_equals | dir_component_equals

rule_type_semantics.path_contains: 'value' in node.path — substring match on full path string
rule_type_semantics.dir_component_equals: value in Path(node.path).parts — any path component (including filename) exactly equals value

activation_class_semantics.LIMITED: node_count >= 2 → grounded = True; else present=True, grounded=False
activation_class_semantics.STRUCTURAL_ONLY: Any match → present = True, grounded = False (structural evidence only)

matching_logic.per_node: first matching rule wins — at most one match per node across all rules
matching_logic.evidence_cap: 10 — at most 10 evidence_paths in output per CEU (sorted, first 10)
